claim: One-person AI businesses can scale to $10M+ by automating bottlenecks with AI agents rather than hiring; revenue grows while headcount stays near 1.
actionable: If building a solo AI business, identify the highest-leverage bottleneck and automate it with agents; focus on systems design, not headcount.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: Start with identifying painful problems (painkillers not vitamins) in growing markets where customers already spend money solving them; call to ask for advice rather than to sell.
actionable: Before building anything, call 10 potential customers and ask for advice on their problem; take notes on the actual workflows and pain points they describe.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: Solve the problem manually first before automating; use simple tools (spreadsheets, virtual assistants) and get paid by customers to learn the workflow before building software.
actionable: Create a done-for-you offer with a problem statement, promise, timeline, price, and guarantee; sell it manually first using spreadsheets and simple tools.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: Build a clickable prototype (non-functional mock-up) to validate customer understanding and willingness to pay before writing any real code; this is the Wizard of Oz approach.
actionable: Use Figma, Visily.ai, or UXpilot.ai to create a clickable prototype in hours; show it to 5 customers and observe what they click and ask.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: An MVP should include only core features that solve the stated problem; don't add white-labeling, advanced reports, or custom permissions until they impact 80% of users.
actionable: Track feature requests; only build features if they impact 80%+ of users; say 'thanks, we'll let you know' to early adopter requests that distract from the core.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: Use Manus or similar agentic AI tools to build an MVP in minutes by describing the screens and flow in plain English; skip code and let the AI handle implementation.
actionable: Write a detailed prompt describing your app's three core screens, auth, and UI style; let Manus generate the full stack; iterate with follow-up prompts.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)

claim: Scale from 100k to 10M+ using AI agents and workflows, not hiring; focus yourself on strategy and sales while agents handle operations, support, and finance.
actionable: At each revenue milestone, identify the next operational bottleneck and automate it with agents; hire only when agents can't scale further.
source_title: How to Build a $10M Solo AI Business (Zero Code)
